mapper.sql: s.id, s.file_name, s.file_path, s.file_url, s.file_type, s.file_size, s.description, s.uploader_id, s.created_at, s.updated_at, s.is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM yx_knowledge_source s LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON s.uploader_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE s.is_deleted = FALSE
AND s.file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%')
ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM yx_knowledge_source s WHERE s.is_deleted = FALSE
AND s.file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%')

SELECT ,
FROM yx_knowledge_source s LEFT JOIN yx_user u ON s.uploader_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yx_knowledge_source (file_name, file_path, file_url, file_type, file_size, description, uploader_id) VALUES (#{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{description}, #{uploaderId})
mapper.update: UPDATE yx_knowledge_source SET file_name = #{fileName}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, file_type = #{fileType}, file_size = #{fileSize}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE yx_knowledge_source SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
